error_signature: CSS commands do not affect what's shown in the styling panel
title: CSS commands not reflecting in styling panel
symptom: Changes made via CSS commands do not update the styling panel, leading to confusion about the current settings.
applies_when: Using CSS commands to style components
not_this_if: CSS commands are applied correctly and reflected in the editor
root_cause: CSS commands applied directly may not update the visual representation in the styling panel, causing a disconnect between the applied styles and what is displayed in the editor.
fix_steps: Ensure that the CSS commands are correctly applied and saved to the class.
Check if the styling panel reflects the changes made through CSS commands.
agent_instruction: Verify that CSS commands are saved to the class and check the styling panel for updates.
